overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing first-person vehicle driving on a desert highway toward Night City. The player overtakes several vehicles before exiting onto a roadside rest area containing parked cars and a police vehicle.

events.description: green vehicle overtakes the ego vehicle on the left side
pink modified vehicle overtakes the ego vehicle on the left side

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the highway toward Night City, maintaining speed in the right lane

notable_agents.action: green car overtaking the ego vehicle at high speed
pink modified car overtaking the ego vehicle

entered.detail: futuristic city skyline with tall glass towers and industrial structures visible in the hazy distance
desert yucca trees scattered along the roadside and desert floor
electrical transmission towers and power lines running parallel to the highway
metal guardrail along the right side of the road
rocky mountain ranges forming the desert horizon

segments.scene_description: Driving on a wide desert highway with the Night City skyline visible far ahead. The road is flanked by Joshua trees and power lines. Two vehicles overtake on the left as the camera maintains a steady speed toward the distant city.

events.description: passing the Night City 1.2 mileage billboard on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the highway passing other vehicles and the Night City sign, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead in the same lane
black car driving in the left lane parallel to ego

entered.detail: large weathered billboard displaying NIGHT CITY 1.2 in white text

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the desert highway as the Night City sign passes by on the right. Traffic remains light with a few vehicles visible ahead and in the left lane. The city skyline remains visible in the distance while power lines continue alongside the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp leading to rest area

events.description: vehicle begins slowing down and turning right to exit the main highway
transitioning from main highway to parking lot surface

agents.ego_description: slowing down and taking the exit ramp to the right, leaving the main highway and entering a rest area

entered.detail: paved exit ramp branching off from the main highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the main highway by turning right onto an exit ramp. The speed decreases significantly as the camera leaves the main road, passing the guardrail and power lines behind. The surface transitions to a parking lot area with parked vehicles becoming visible.

events.description: entering the parking area with parked vehicles and police presence visible

agents.ego_description: driving slowly through the parking area past parked vehicles including a police SUV and a person standing nearby

notable_agents.action: black NCPD police SUV parked on the left side of the lot
person standing near the police vehicle

segments.scene_description: Driving slowly through a desert rest stop parking area. A black police SUV is parked on the left with a person standing nearby. Other parked vehicles are scattered around the lot. The Night City skyline is no longer visible as the camera faces the desert mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive from a wide desert highway toward the distant silhouette of Night City before transitioning into a quiet roadside rest area. It begins with a steady cruise past Joshua trees and power lines, as other vehicles overtake on the left while the city skyline looms far ahead. As the camera passes the Night City sign on the right, the road continues through the arid landscape under the gaze of the distant metropolis. The scene then shifts as the vehicle slows and turns right onto an exit ramp, leaving the main highway and its guardrails behind to enter a parking lot. Finally, the camera glides slowly through the desert rest stop, passing a black police SUV and scattered parked cars while the view turns away from the city toward the surrounding mountains.
